name: gameengine
description: Clean C++ game engine with AI-driven game development workflow.

asset-importers.description: Optional production asset importer dependencies for PNG, glTF, and common audio source decoding.

desktop-runtime.description: Optional desktop game runtime dependencies for SDL3 window, input, presentation, and audio adapters.

physics-jolt.description: Optional native 3D physics middleware adapter dependency for Jolt Physics.

network-enet.description: Optional ENet loopback network transport adapter dependency.

desktop-gui.description: Deferred desktop editor shell feature; native Win32 editor dependencies will be declared when the shell is implemented.
